name: Baldur's Gate 3 - Act One
description:
Following the Nautiloid crash, you've joined with Shadowheart, Karlach, and Lae'zel, in search of a cure for your Illithid tadpoles. While still early in your adventures together, much has already happened: you've slain a bloodthirsty daywalker, hacked off a mysterious hand sticking out of an ancient sigil, and defeated a dangerous warlock who was relentlessly hunting Karlach.

Now you rest at camp. How you and your party continue is up to you!
creator: aircoqwerty
